OptionDescription.SourceString: Sets the ability for players to activate picture-in-picture. This will show whenever you are not looking at a device that has picture-in-picture enabled, or it is very far away (by default).
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Sets the ability for players to activate picture-in-picture. This will show whenever you are not looking at a device that has picture-in-picture enabled, or it is very far away (by default).
